tab.heading: Legal Proceedings
tab.lockedTooltip: You do not have access to legal proceedings. Contact a Legal Officer.
tab.errorDescription: Please refresh the page or contact support if the issue persists.

empty.title: No Court Case Linked
empty.description: This investigation case has not yet been linked to a court case. A Legal Officer can create and link one.

create.drawerDescription: Link this investigation case to court proceedings.
create.courtPlaceholder: e.g. Federal High Court — Lideta Division
create.defenceCounselPlaceholder: Full name of the defence counsel
create.notesPlaceholder: Any additional notes about the court case...
create.successMessage: Court case created and linked successfully.
create.errorMessage: Failed to create court case. Please try again.
create.discardDescription: Discard changes? The court case will not be created.

update.drawerDescription: Update court case metadata, status, or hearing dates.
update.errorMessage: Failed to update court case. Please try again.

filters.search: Search by suspect or crime type...

empty.title: No Charges Filed
empty.description: No charges have been filed in this court case yet.
empty.cta: Add the first charge using the button above.

charges.emptyFiltered: No charges match your current filters.

create.drawerDescription: File a new charge in this court case.
create.suspectPlaceholder: Search suspects linked to this case...
create.suspectHint: Only persons linked to this investigation case as suspects are shown.
create.suspectEmpty: No suspects are linked to this case. Add suspects from the Personnel module first.
create.errorMessage: Failed to file charge. Please try again.

update.drawerDescription: Change the status of this charge.
update.terminalNotice: This charge has reached a final status and cannot be changed.
update.convictNotice: Selecting 'Convicted' will record this charge as a conviction. You must also record the sentencing details. This action cannot be reversed.
update.errorMessage: Failed to update charge status. Please try again.

drop.confirmDescription: Charge against {suspectName} ({crimeType}) will be permanently set to Dropped. This action cannot be undone.

sentence.drawerDescription: Record the sentencing details for this conviction.
sentence.convictionNotice: Recording a sentence will permanently set this charge to Convicted. This cannot be reversed.
sentence.durationMonthsHint: Enter the total sentence length in months.
sentence.fineAmountPlaceholder: Enter fine amount in Ethiopian Birr
sentence.issuedByJudgePlaceholder: Full name of the sentencing judge
sentence.notesPlaceholder: Any additional sentencing notes or conditions...
sentence.successMessage: Sentence recorded successfully. Charge is now Convicted.
sentence.errorMessage: Failed to record sentence. Please try again.

viewSentence.pendingNotice: Sentence details have not been recorded yet.
viewSentence.immutableNotice: This sentence record is permanent and cannot be modified.

bulkDrop.dialogDescription: The selected charges will be dropped.
bulkDrop.terminalWarning: {terminalCount} of your selected charges are already at a final status and will be skipped. Only {droppableCount} charge(s) will be affected.
bulkDrop.allTerminalTooltip: All selected charges are at a final status. No action available.
bulkDrop.partialSuccessMessage: {updated} charge(s) dropped. {failed} could not be updated.
bulkDrop.errorMessage: Failed to drop charges. Please try again.

editSentence.openButtonHint: Amendments are logged in the audit trail with the original values preserved.
editSentence.drawerDescription: Amend the recorded sentence for this conviction.
editSentence.amendmentNotice: Amending this sentence creates a permanent audit entry showing the original and amended values. The original values cannot be deleted.
editSentence.amendmentReasonPlaceholder: Explain the reason for amending this sentence...
editSentence.amendmentReasonHint: Please enter at least 10 characters detailing why this sentence is being amended.
editSentence.successMessage: Sentence amended successfully. The audit trail has been updated.
editSentence.errorMessage: Failed to amend sentence. Please try again.
editSentence.discardDescription: Are you sure you want to discard your changes? Your unsaved data will be lost.

appeal.drawerDescription: Reverse this terminal charge via an appeal record.
appeal.consequenceStatus: Revert the charge status from {status} to Active
appeal.consequenceAudit: Create a permanent appeal record in the audit trail
appeal.consequenceSentence: Remove the existing sentence record (if any)
appeal.irreversibleNotice: This action is logged and cannot be reversed without filing another appeal.
appeal.successMessage: Appeal filed. Charge status reverted to Active.
appeal.errorMessage: Failed to file appeal. Please try again.
appeal.discardDescription: Are you sure you want to discard your changes? Your unsaved data will be lost.

filters.search: Search by case title or court no...

empty.title: No Court Cases
empty.description: No court cases found. Court cases are created from within individual case files.

courtCasesList.emptyFiltered: No court cases match your current filters.
